positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a majestic otter wearing a tiny explorer's hat, floating in a crescent moon bathtub filled with glow-in-the-dark bubbles. The background features stylized bioluminescent rainforest foliage and subtle constellations. The overall style is modern folk art meets Art Nouveau, rendered with clean, bold outlines and flat, vibrant colors. High contrast and silhouette definition are key. Composition is centered, making the otter the primary focus. Soft, magical glow emanating from the bubbles and foliage. --ar 1:1 --style illustrative --s 750 --v 6
negative: blurry, low detail, text, logo, watermark, signature, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad composition, ugly, monochromatic
